title: Tx_Enabled, Ty_Enabled, Tz_Enabled Property
description: This activates/inactivates, or returns the force control function of the rotational direction.
notes:
This activates/inactivates, or returns the force control function of the rotational direction.

For SCARA robots (including RS series), the force control cannot be executed with the FC object when the following properties are "True".

Tx_Enabled property

Ty_Enabled property
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
